0.response: {"Q0":"I was saying the keys out loud,especially J,K and L so that I don't get confused on which key to press during the game."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I was guided by the probality of collecting the stated amounts, I would mostly go for higher probability galaxy so that I don't risk on loosing the stated amounts."}

5.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I did just a few times due to a slight confusion but I could get back on track after one dig. over 95 percent were accurate. The confusion was just less than 5 percent"}

8.response: {"Q0":"I was more focused on the digging because making a wrong move here would make me loose my gems."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I have to say that I eally enjoyed the game and I'm looking foward to more of this. They were so engaging!"}
